title: About Us
note: Company overview describing Mondelez's global snack portfolio and major brands including Oreo, Cadbury, Ritz, Milka, Toblerone, and CLIF.

title: Our Brands
note: Brand directory confirming Oreo and Cadbury as Mondelez brands.

title: 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K
note: Annual-report source for 2025 revenue, business scale, category exposure, and risk context.

title: Commission fines Mondelēz €337.5 million for cross-border trade restrictions
note: Regulatory source documenting European Commission findings on Mondelez restrictions affecting chocolate, biscuits, and coffee products.

title: Market capitalization of Mondelez International (MDLZ)
note: Canonical market-cap URL carried in the manifest and used for market-cap context.

title: P/E ratio for Mondelez International (MDLZ)
note: Market-data source for Mondelez trailing P/E ratio as of May 2026.

title: Mondelez International Statistics and Valuation
note: Cross-check source for current market capitalization and trailing P/E ratio.

title: Open Food Facts API Documentation
note: Documents Open Food Facts API access and the Open Database License for food-product data.

title: Tandoor: Smart Recipe Management
note: Open-source self-hosted recipe-management project relevant to open recipe and household or community production workflows.

title: TandoorRecipes/recipes
note: Repository source for the Tandoor Recipes open-source project.

title: Welcome to Farm Hack
note: Open-source farming-tool community source for distributed food-system production and tool-sharing concepts.

title: Open Source Microfactory
note: Conceptual source for open microfactory approaches to localized production.
